search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroup | mvexpand groupName | dedup groupName | table groupName | sort groupName

condition.set: [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]
search [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]

search.query: | stats count as Initialize | eval title="Hardware Diversity Summary" | table title

`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset physicalAssetType=$typeSelector$ | fields deviceName, deviceId, productType, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber | dedup serialNumber | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | mvexpand groupName | stats dc(productId) as PIDs by productFamily | search productFamily="*Catalyst*" | stats avg(PIDs) as LANswitchDiversity

single.option: Average Product IDs per Catalyst Family

search.query: `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset physicalAssetType=$typeSelector$ AND productType ="Routers" | fields deviceName, deviceId, productType, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber | dedup serialNumber | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(productId) as PIDs by productFamily | stats avg(PIDs) as RouterDiversity

single.option: Average Product IDs per Router Family

search.query: | stats count as Initialize | eval title="Inventory and Diversity Details" | table title

`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset | fields deviceName, deviceId, productType, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber | dedup serialNumber | search physicalAssetType=Chassis | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(serialNumber) as Chassis by productType | sort -Chassis | head 10

chart.title: Top 10 PID Count by Product Type

search.query: `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset | fields deviceName, deviceId, productType, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber | dedup serialNumber | search physicalAssetType=Chassis | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(productId) as PIDs by productType | sort -PIDs | head 10

`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset | fields deviceName, deviceId, productType, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber | dedup serialNumber | search physicalAssetType=Chassis | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(serialNumber) as Chassis by productFamily | sort -Chassis | head 10

chart.title: Top 10 Product IDs by Product Type

search.query: `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset | fields deviceName, deviceId, productType, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, covered_product_line_end_date, serialNumber | dedup serialNumber | search physicalAssetType=Chassis | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(productId) as "Product IDs" by productType | sort -"Product IDs" | head 10

`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset | fields deviceName, deviceId, productType, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber | dedup serialNumber | search physicalAssetType=Chassis | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats count as Chassis by productId | sort -Chassis | head 10

chart.title: Top 10 Product IDs by Product Family

search.query: `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset | fields deviceName, deviceId, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, covered_product_line_end_date, serialNumber | dedup serialNumber | search physicalAssetType=Chassis | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(productId) as "Product IDs" by productFamily | sort -"Product IDs" | head 10

`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset physicalAssetType=Module | fields deviceName, deviceId, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | table deviceName, deviceId, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber | dedup deviceId serialNumber | stats count as Modules by productId | sort -Modules | head 10

`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset productFamily="*Transceiver*" | fields deviceName, deviceId, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | table deviceName, deviceId, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber | dedup deviceId serialNumber | stats count as Transceivers by productId | sort -Transceivers | head 10

`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset physicalAssetType="Fan" | fields deviceName, deviceId, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber, _time slot | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | table deviceName, deviceId, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber, slot, groupName, _time | dedup deviceId productId slot | stats count as Fans by productId | sort -Fans | head 10

`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset physicalAssetType="Power Supply" | fields deviceName, deviceId, productFamily, productId, physicalAssetType, serialNumber slot | dedup deviceId productId slot | stats count as Supplies by productId | sort -Supplies | head 10

`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | dedup physicalAssetId | table chassisName cpyKey deviceId deviceName groupName hardwareRevision installedFlash installedMemory physicalAssetId physicalAssetSubtype physicalAssetType printedCircuitBoardName printedCircuitBoardRevision productFamily productId productType serialNumber serialNumberStatus slot softwareVersion timestamp topAssemblyNumber topAssemblyNumberRevision | sort groupName chassisName
